"use client";

import { useTableFilters } from "@/src/hooks/use-table-filters";

type SortColumn = "title" | "author";

export function ExampleTable({ totalItems }: { totalItems: number }) {
  const { sortLink, safePage, totalPages, startIndex } = useTableFilters<SortColumn>(
    totalItems,
    10,
    { sortKeys: ["title", "author"] }
  );

  return (
    <div>
      <a href={sortLink("title")}>Ordenar por titulo</a>
      <div>{`Page: ${safePage} / ${totalPages}`}</div>
      <div>{`Start index: ${startIndex}`}</div>
    </div>
  );
}
